item.title: Threat Intelligence: Netflix Phishing Scam
item.description: A new Phishing campaign has been identified by authorities in Ohio that is targeting Netflix users. The campaign sends an email to a Netflix customer

item.title: Threat Intelligence: Customer Information Exposed in Caribou Coffee…
item.description: Caribou Coffee suffered a data breach which was disclosed last week by the company. The breach affected more than 200 of their locations around the…

item.title: Threat Intelligence: NASA Hit With Data Breach
item.description: Current and former employees of NASA from July 2006 through October 2018 could have been affected by a data breach - Binary Defense Threat Intelligence

item.title: Threat Intelligence: ZipRecruiter Suffers Data Breach
item.description: The issue is with part of ZipRecruiter's site that enables a business with authorization to access the CV database to contact the person seeking a job.

item.title: Threat Intelligence: New LamePyre Mac Malware
item.description: The third malware strain targeting MacOS this month has been discovered and dubbed LamePyre. Although it appears to still be under development

item.title: Binary Defense Vision with UEBA, Simpler Onboarding and 2FA, Improved…
item.description: Binary Defense™ is excited to announce a new release of both Agent and Server packed with substantial new features and enhancements to the Vision platform.

item.title: Threat Intelligence: Instagram Exposes Passwords in Plaintext
item.description: The popular social media photo sharing app Instagram has recently patched a bug in their website that accidentally exposed some of their users’ passwords

item.title: Threat Intelligence: Bitcoin Giveaway Scam Targets Google
item.description: The Google Twitter account for its G Suite cloud subsidiary, which has more than 800,000 followers, has been the recent target of a growing Bitcoin scam

item.title: Threat Intelligence: Cisco Mistakenly Adds Dirty Cow Exploit Code to…
item.description: Cisco announced that they unintentionally released code when testing their TelePresence Video Communication Server. Dirty Cow (CVE-2016-5195)

item.title: Threat Intelligence: WordPress Zero-day
item.description: A zero-day vulnerability has been discovered affecting WP GDPR Compliance. WP GDPR Compliance is a WordPress plugin

item.title: Gh0stCringe (Formerly CirenegRAT)
item.description: Learn more about this emerging threat. Gh0stCringe is a particularly nasty piece of malware that can override controls.

item.description: Cybersecurity alert: password spraying attacks, how they work, and simple steps to defend against them from the Binary Defense Counterintelligence team.

item.title: Binary Defense Expands Security Operations Center in Stow, Ohio
item.description: Binary Defense is the full-service security partner—real people, detecting real threats, in real time and a global leader in managed security solutions

item.title: Threat Intelligence: Employees’ Private Data Compromised in Airbus…
item.description: Airbus has recently discovered a breach in their system which led to unauthorized parties accessing employee information, Airbus Data Breach

item.title: Threat Intelligence: Verity Healthcare Suffers Multiple Phishing…
item.description: Verity Health System has informed an undisclosed number of people that their information may have been accessed due to phishing

item.title: Threat Intelligence: iOS Bug Gives Unauthorized Access to User’s…
item.description: An iOS bug in Apple devices running iOS 12.1 or later could leave users open to eavesdropping through Facetime. To see threat analysts notes and…

item.title: Threat Intelligence: Adware Installers Using Rumba Variant STOP
item.description: DJVU and Tro STOP ransomware varients have been seen a lot over the past month, the new Rumba variant is similar but it adjoins its .rumba extension

item.title: Threat Intelligence: WordPress Plugin WPML Hacked
item.description: WP MultiLingual (WPML) is home to 600,000 users who pay for their WordPress translation services. Recently they have suffered their first security issue

item.title: Threat Intelligence: Nine Adware Apps Discovered on Play Store
item.description: Adware Apps Discovered, unwanted ads are being hidden within nine apps found on the Google Play Store and have been flooding users’ devices.

item.title: Threat Intelligence: Government Websites Down Due to Non-Renewed TLS…
item.description: More than 80 government sites have been impacted due to their TLS certificates not being renewed. A good number of these sites now cannot be accessed

item.title: Threat Intelligence: Yokagawa Severe Vulnerability
item.description: With a 7.7 rate of severity, the vulnerability (CVE-1081-16196) has been affecting multiple Yokagawa products and it exists within the Vnet/IP

item.title: Binary Defense Predictions for 2019
item.description: 2018 carried a plethora of cyber-attacks, including tons of data breaches that have started to become more talked about than ever. Here are our predictions
